allowlist_blocklist_enforced_on_sign_in.description: Whether allowlist/blocklist restrictions are also enforced during sign-in

block_disposable_email_domains.description: Whether to block disposable email domains

block_email_subaddresses.description: Whether to block email subaddresses (plus addressing)

captcha_enabled.description: Whether CAPTCHA is enabled for sign-up

email_link_require_same_client.description: Whether email links must be opened from the same client

enabled.description: Whether user lockout is enabled

immutable.description: When enabled, users cannot change their email address after sign-up

required_for_sign_up.description: Whether email address is required for sign-up

sign_in_strategies.description: Strategies available for sign-in via email

used_for_sign_in.description: Whether email address is used for sign-in

used_for_sign_up.description: Whether email address is used for sign-up

verify_at_sign_up.description: Whether email address must be verified at sign-up

enabled.description: Whether authenticator app is enabled
Whether backup codes are enabled

required_for_sign_in.description: Whether MFA is required on sign-in

required_for_sign_up.description: Whether MFA is required on sign-up

allow_autofill.description: Whether passkey options appear in autofill UI

show_sign_in_button.description: Whether a dedicated passkey sign-in button is displayed

used_for_sign_in.description: Whether passkey authentication is enabled for sign-in

device_trust.description: When signing in with a password on a new client (e.g. device), users will always be challenged for a second factor.

enabled.description: Whether device trust is enabled for this instance

disable_hibp.description: Whether to disable Have I Been Pwned check

enabled.description: Whether password authentication is enabled

enforce_hibp_on_sign_in.description: Whether to enforce HIBP check on sign-in (not just sign-up)

max_length.description: Maximum password length (0 means use default of 72, valid explicit values: 8-72)

min_length.description: Minimum password length (0 means use default of 8, valid explicit values: 8-72)

require_lowercase.description: Whether password must contain lowercase letters

require_special_char.description: Whether password must contain special characters

require_uppercase.description: Whether password must contain uppercase letters

required.description: Whether password is required for sign-up

show_zxcvbn.description: Whether to show password strength indicator

immutable.description: When enabled, users cannot change their phone number after sign-up

required_for_sign_up.description: Whether phone number is required for sign-up

second_factor_strategies.description: Strategies available for phone second factor

sign_in_strategies.description: Strategies available for sign-in via phone

used_for_second_factor.description: Whether phone number is used for second factor

used_for_sign_in.description: Whether phone number is used for sign-in

used_for_sign_up.description: Whether phone number is used for sign-up

verify_at_sign_up.description: Whether phone number must be verified at sign-up

allow_extended_special_characters.description: Whether to allow extended special characters (^$. !`#+'~) in usernames beyond the default (-_)

allow_numeric_usernames.description: Whether to allow usernames that contain only digits. When enabled, phone-number inputs must be provided in explicit E.164 format.

immutable.description: When enabled, users cannot change their username after sign-up

required_for_sign_up.description: Whether username is required for sign-up

used_for_sign_in.description: Whether username is used for sign-in

used_for_sign_up.description: Whether username is used for sign-up

required_for_sign_up.description: Whether web3 wallet is required for sign-up

sign_in_strategies.description: Strategies available for sign-in via web3 wallet

used_for_sign_in.description: Whether web3 wallet is used for sign-in

used_for_sign_up.description: Whether web3 wallet is used for sign-up

verification_strategies.description: Strategies available for web3 wallet verification

verify_at_sign_up.description: Whether web3 wallet must be verified at sign-up

include_in_jwt.description: Whether the feature is included in session JWTs

jwt_value.description: Optional custom value included in JWT claims

publicly_visible.description: Whether the feature is visible to end users

free_trial_requires_payment_method.description: Require payment method for free trials

organization_enabled.description: Enable billing for organizations. When enabled, a default free plan (free_org) is created automatically. Requires organizations to be enabled on the instance.

annual_monthly_amount.description: Monthly equivalent when billed annually, in cents

features.description: Feature slugs attached to this plan, in display order. Empty array clears all features; omit to leave attachments unchanged.

payer_type.description: Who pays: user or org. Must match an enabled billing type (user_enabled or organization_enabled).

publicly_visible.description: Whether plan is visible to end users

user_enabled.description: Enable billing for users. When enabled, a default free plan (free_user) is created automatically.

logo.description: Source URL for the application logo (not yet implemented)
